name: Advance America
description_short: Orlando's Advance America at 7661 S Orange Blossom Trail, FL, offers quick payday and title loans.
description_long:
Advance America is located at 7661 S Orange Blossom Trail in Orlando, FL, a standalone storefront serving residents throughout Orange County. The Orlando branch operates Monday through Thursday from 10 AM to 6 PM, Friday and Saturday from 9 AM to 6 PM, and is closed on Sundays. This Orlando location is easy to find and designed for quick visits when you need fast cash.

At this Orlando location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other quick-cash services. The Advance America team at 7661 S Orange Blossom Trail is available to answer questions and process applications during business hours. Call +1 407-251-4240 to speak with a representative or get details on current rates and loan terms.

For Orlando residents in need of immediate cash, this South Orange Blossom Trail location offers a straightforward application process—bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a blank check or bank information. Advance America specializes in short-term lending solutions for those facing unexpected expenses or cash flow gaps.
address: 7661 S Orange Blossom Trl, Orlando, FL 32809

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee offered. These are loan products with per-loan fees and interest, not subscription services.

tiers.name: Payday Loans
features: No hard credit check required (varies by state/product)
In-store cash or direct deposit to bank account

tiers.name: Title Loans
features: Loan amount based on vehicle value
Keep driving your vehicle during loan term

tiers.name: Line of Credit
features: Flexible draw-down up to a set credit limit
Interest charged only on amount drawn

pros: 800–889 physical store locations offering same-day in-store cash pickup
Founded in 1997 — over 25 years of operation with state licensing in ~22–27 states
A+ BBB rating with accreditation achieved by 2024
No hard credit check required for select products, accessible to consumers with poor or no credit
Title loans up to $25,000 available for larger short-term borrowing needs
Both in-store and online application channels with direct deposit funding available
Lines of credit available in select states for flexible, reusable borrowing
cons: Payday loan APRs range from 143.29% to 688.28% — among the highest legally permitted costs of credit
Received an $18.5 million CFPB enforcement order in 2012 for illegal debt collection threats and credit reporting failures
Over 1,000 consumer complaints filed with the CFPB since 2013
Only available in approximately 22–27 states — not accessible to all U.S. borrowers
Title loans carry risk of vehicle repossession if loan is not repaid
best_for: Consumers facing a genuine cash emergency before their next payday who cannot qualify for a bank loan or credit union product
People with poor, thin, or no credit history who are locked out of traditional lending channels
Borrowers who need physical cash in hand same day and live near one of the 800+ store locations
Individuals in one of the ~22–27 states where Advance America holds state lending licenses
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for consumers who need emergency cash immediately and have exhausted lower-cost options — particularly those with damaged credit who cannot qualify at a bank, credit union, or fintech lender. The main caveat is cost: payday loan APRs can exceed 688%, and the company carries a documented history of CFPB enforcement action and ongoing consumer complaints, so borrowers should fully understand total repayment costs before signing any agreement.
services: Payday loans ($100–$1,800, repaid on next payday)
Title loans (up to $25,000, secured by vehicle title)
Lines of credit (flexible draw-down, interest on drawn balance only)
In-store cash advances with same-day pickup
Direct deposit funding to bank account (typically within 24 hours)
Online account management portal (login, apply, manage loans)
State-licensed consumer lending in approximately 22–27 states

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 7661 S Orange Blossom Trail, Orlando, FL. Fast payday and title loans available.
